info.title: resend-service API
info.description: Current contract for the partial Kotlin/http4k runtime port. Health is implemented. Conversation and outbox operations enforce bearer authentication and then return 501. Webhook verification and processing are not implemented and the webhook route always returns 501. This contract intentionally does not advertise the removed Express runtime's success behavior. Framework-generated errors are outside the controlled JSON contract.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Registered webhook route; processing is pending

tags.name: Conversations
tags.description: Authenticated route stubs pending the Kotlin data-layer port

tags.name: Outbox
tags.description: Authenticated route stubs pending outbox implementation

get.description: Returns ok only when all required configuration values are nonblank and the configured PostgreSQL connection is valid. This does not verify migrations, Resend access, or availability of the unfinished email workflows. Query parameters are ignored. Database pool initialization occurs before the HTTP server starts, so some initial database failures prevent this route from becoming available.

200.description: Configuration is present and the database connection is valid.

503.description: Configuration is incomplete, no data source is available, or database validation failed.

post.description: The current runtime does not read the body, require Svix headers, verify a signature, persist the delivery, or project an event. Every request returns 501.

get.description: Authentication is enforced. Query parameters are not parsed or validated. A valid credential receives 501.

post.description: Authentication is enforced. The request body, Content-Type, and Idempotency-Key are not read or validated. A valid credential receives 501.
Authentication is enforced. The request body, Content-Type, and Idempotency-Key are not read or validated. A valid credential receives 501.
The dedicated drain credential is enforced. The request body is not read or validated. A valid drain credential receives 501.

get.description: Authentication is enforced. The path value and query parameters are not parsed or validated. A valid credential receives 501.

patch.description: Authentication is enforced. The path value and request body are not parsed or validated. A valid credential receives 501.

post.summary: Synchronous reply sending is not implemented
post.description: Authentication is enforced. The path value, request body, Content-Type, and Idempotency-Key are not read or validated. A valid credential receives 501.
Authentication is enforced. The path value, request body, Content-Type, and Idempotency-Key are not read or validated. A valid credential receives 501.

get.description: Authentication is enforced. Path values and query parameters are not parsed or validated. A valid credential receives 501.

ConversationBearer.description: Server-to-server conversation credential from CONVERSATION_API_KEY. The complete header must contain Bearer, one or more literal spaces, and a token with no literal spaces or trailing content.

OutboxDrainBearer.description: Dedicated scheduler/worker credential from OUTBOX_DRAIN_API_KEY. The complete header must contain Bearer, one or more literal spaces, and a token with no literal spaces or trailing content.

ConversationId.name: conversationId
ConversationId.description: Unvalidated route segment in the current runtime.

Unauthorized.description: The Authorization header is missing, malformed, or contains the wrong scoped credential.

ConversationCredentialMissing.description: CONVERSATION_API_KEY is blank or absent in server configuration.

DrainCredentialMissing.description: OUTBOX_DRAIN_API_KEY is blank or absent in server configuration.

ConversationPending.description: Authentication succeeded, but the Kotlin data-layer operation is not implemented.

example.error: Operation is pending in the Kotlin data-layer port

WebhookPending.description: Webhook verification and projection are not implemented.

example.error: Webhook projection is pending in the Kotlin port
